free_text: Elastic scattering of protons by deuterium between
Deuterium gas in target cell with pressure of 0.5 atm
with purity of 99.6%. Windows were 4 mg/cm2 Kapton
foils, which extended for 350 deg around the target.
Two Si(Li) detectors. Low angle detector with
thickness of 5 mm and high angle detector with
thickness of 2mm located at an angle 30 deg greater
NaI(Tl) detector used as monitor counter
